meaning: <西>n.(古巴)萨泰里阿教(结合非洲部落和天主教宗教仪式的一种宗教)
examples: Santeria, also called Regla DE Ocha, is a slimmed-down system of beliefs that came from the Yoruba people, in what is now Nigeria.
He has even become a religious symbol for the followers of Santeria, a mixture between West African religions and Catholicism that still has many adherents in Cuba and Miami.
